description: Rename pyo3 *_bound deprecated APIs to drop clippy -D warnings

agent_verify.blocker_detail: AC-037 netns-deny-egress: pre-existing sandbox limitation (rootless userns+netns unavailable), not introduced by this change

notes: pyo3 0.24.1 deprecated Python::get_type_bound -> Python::get_type (pure rename, no signature change)
pyo3 0.24.1 deprecated PyErr::value_bound -> PyErr::value (pure rename, no signature change)
Both unsuffixed names are the canonical API in pyo3 0.28.x (which removes _bound variants entirely)
No test changes, no behavior changes, no new code
